text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to get the win today and show Zephyr
that even the highest walls can be conquered!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm sure that'll be enough to give her courage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower is itching to go. She seems to get
incredibly motivated when she's doing something
to help out others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm positive she'll show me some great running
today!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list:
You're so cool when you do your best for
someone else.

You're so cool when you do your best for
someone else.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I'm sure the challenge she's decided on is much
harder than what I face.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I don't know if I can help her. But I do know that
I want to try.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(After all, everyone needs someone to pick them
up when they're down.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I want to be that for her. She's so cool, working
so hard for someone else's sake. I want to cheer
her on.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I hope my feelings reach you, Zephyr!
